title: Fog Control
description: Allows the user to adjust the (client) distance at which fogs render or disable them completely.
body:
Allows the user to adjust the (client) distance at which fogs render or disable them completely. These settings can be accessed in the mod's Mod Menu settings.
</br></br>
Requires [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).
